label: Storm the Siege Muster Yard
note: Dragon's Lair entrance (docs/RAIL-COMMAND.md §Each map's FOUR sub-tracks): the dragon's host has turned the castle yard into its siege muster ground. Storming it relocates the princess (and the castle-approach kin, if unlocked) into the yard, where the warcamp commander holds. Rose-OR-gem (roses logarithmic shortcut, gems exponential fallback).
